process.title: How It Works

industries.title: Trusted Across Sectors
industries.subtitle: Daily translation partners for individuals, corporates, and government stakeholders

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Quick answers to the most common questions we receive

items.a: A certified translation is produced by a licensed translator and carries the translator's official stamp, signature, and certification statement. It is legally accepted by Saudi ministries, courts, embassies, and foreign authorities as an accurate rendering of the source document.

items.q: Are your translations accepted by embassies and government bodies?
items.a: Yes. Tabador Translation Est. holds Translation Licence No. 317 and is accepted by all Saudi government authorities (Jawazat, MOHE, MOFA, MOH, MOJ, Chambers of Commerce) and by foreign embassies inside and outside the Kingdom — including full Schengen file acceptance.
Standard turnaround for most personal documents is same-day or next business day. We also offer an express service for time-sensitive filings. Timing is confirmed with your quote.
More than 100 language pairs, including Arabic ⇄ English, French, German, Spanish, Italian, Urdu, Turkish, Farsi, Tagalog, Chinese, Russian, and more. If you need a specific pair, ask us.
Absolutely. Send a clear scan or photo via WhatsApp, email, or the quick-quote form on this page. You do not need to visit the office unless you prefer to.
Pricing is based on the document type, length, language pair, and urgency. We send you a fixed quote before any work starts — no surprises.

about.title: About Tabador
about.subtitle: 15+ Years of Certified Excellence in Dammam
about.body: Tabador Translation Est. has been the trusted choice for certified translations in Dammam and the Eastern Province for over 15 years. Founded by Mudthar Ahmad, a professional translator, we built our reputation on a simple promise: your documents right the first time.
about.missionBody: Deliver certified translations that are accepted on the first submission — saving our clients time, cost, and stress.
about.visionBody: To be the Eastern Province's most trusted translation partner for individuals, businesses, and government.

values.title: Precision
values.desc: Every term, number, and stamp rendered exactly.

values.title: Speed
values.desc: Standard and express service that respects your deadlines.

values.title: Commitment
values.desc: We stand behind every translation — with our licence and our name.

values.title: Confidentiality
values.desc: Your documents are handled privately and never shared.
